tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Scaffolding & Dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set up FastAPI backend + React/Vite frontend with all deps installed and hello-world endpoint working.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["institutional_memory/dashboard/__init__.py", "institutional_memory/dashboard/server.py", "dashboard-ui/package.json", "dashboard-ui/vite.config.ts", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "curl http://localhost:8000/api/health", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FastAPI starts on :8000", "Vite proxies to FastAPI", "Dark theme renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: WebSocket Broadcast Infrastructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create WebSocket connection manager and hook into audit.log_event() for real-time broadcast.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["institutional_memory/dashboard/broadcast.py", "institutional_memory/dashboard/server.py", "institutional_memory/audit.py", "tests/test_broadcast.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_broadcast.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WS clients receive audit events", "Backfill on connect", "Multi-client broadcast"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: REST API Endpoints (Health, Stats, Queries)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement REST endpoints for system health, ChromaDB stats, and recent search queries.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["institutional_memory/dashboard/health.py", "institutional_memory/dashboard/server.py", "tests/test_dashboard_api.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_dashboard_api.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Health endpoint works", "Stats endpoint works", "Recent queries endpoint works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Frontend WebSocket Hook & Event Context
tasks.description:
**Goal:** React context + hook for WebSocket connection, reconnection, and event distribution.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard-ui/src/hooks/useWebSocket.ts", "dashboard-ui/src/lib/eventLabels.ts", "dashboard-ui/src/context/EventContext.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "browser console check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Auto-reconnect works", "Backfill loads", "Connection status exposed", "Event labels correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: System Status Strip Component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Top bar showing Slack/Chroma/Ollama/Listener health with colored dots + last event time.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard-ui/src/components/StatusStrip.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual browser check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Colored health dots", "Polls health endpoint", "Live last event time", "Pulse animation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Animated Pipeline Flow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SVG pipeline (INBOX→EMBED→CHROMA→SEARCH→SLACK) with animated data packets on events.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard-ui/src/components/PipelineFlow.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "trigger log_event and observe animation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 nodes rendered", "Idle pulse animation", "Event triggers glow + packet", "Cascading works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Live Telemetry Feed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scrolling event feed with curated labels, color coding, and expandable JSON.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard-ui/src/components/LiveFeed.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "trigger events and check feed", "acceptanceCriteria": ["15 events visible", "Color coded", "Slide-in animation", "Expandable JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Relevance Distribution Chart
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tremor AreaChart showing cosine scores over time with threshold line.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard-ui/src/components/RelevanceChart.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "run searches and check chart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Area chart renders", "Threshold line visible", "Real-time updates", "Empty state works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Recent Queries Table & Knowledge Base Status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bottom row panels — queries table with score colors + KB stats panel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard-ui/src/components/RecentQueries.tsx", "dashboard-ui/src/components/KnowledgeBase.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "visual check all panels", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Queries table renders", "Score colors correct", "KB stats show", "KB refreshes on ingest", "Grid layout complete"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Production Build & Serve
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Configure prod build so FastAPI serves built React as static files — single process.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["institutional_memory/dashboard/server.py", "dashboard-ui/.gitignore", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && uv run python -m institutional_memory.dashboard.server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Build outputs correctly", "Static serving works", "API routes preserved", "No CORS issues"]}
```
